name: Chocolate Waffles
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the shortening and sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Add the well-beaten egg yolks to the mixture and stir until combined.
3. Melt the chocolate over hot water, stirring constantly, then add it to the creamed mixture. Mix thoroughly.
4. Sift together the flour, baking powder, and salt. Gradually mix in the sifted ingredients with the milk alternately into the chocolate mixture.
5. Add the vanilla extract and fold in the stiffly beaten egg whites until just combined.
6. Pour the batter into a hot waffle iron and cook until golden brown.
7. Serve immediately with hot syrup, whipped cream, or ice cream.
